description: Parent asks for kids activities, follows up with age and interest, gets specific club details and indoor options

messages.content: What is there to do with kids in Batley?

Depends what they're into — there's actually a decent mix around here.

Outdoor (if the weather's decent):
- **Wilton Park** — big playground, ducks, loads of space to run around
- **Oakwell Hall** — really popular, nice walks + open areas for kids

Indoor (good all year round):
- **Tag X** — laser tag, kids love it
- **Stompers / Little Town of Play** — great for younger kids
- **Tenpin (Dewsbury)** — bowling, easy win for a day out

Clubs & activities:
- Football, cricket, martial arts — loads of local options
- Madressa/Quran classes if that's relevant

How old are they?

Perfect age for it — loads of options around here.

A few solid clubs:
- **Batley Boys FC** — probably the main one locally, good setup
- **Spen Valley AFC** — strong youth teams, bit wider catchment
- **Hanging Heaton FC** — well respected, good coaching

At 8, he'd go into Under 9s. Most train midweek and play Sundays.

If I'm being honest — Batley Boys is usually the first one people try.

Do you want their details?
Yes the Batley Boys one please

Batley Boys FC — best way to get in touch:
- **Facebook:** search "Batley Boys FC" — they post trials + training
- **Email:** batleyboysfc@gmail.com
- **Training:** usually around Batley Sports & Tennis Centre

Best thing — just message them on Facebook, it goes straight to the right coach.

Squads fill up quick, so worth doing it this week.
Any indoor sports for rainy days?

Yeah, plenty you can fall back on when the weather's bad.

Active options:
- **Batley Sports & Tennis Centre** — indoor hall, plus proper tennis courts
- **Tag X** — good if he's got energy to burn

More relaxed:
- **Tenpin Dewsbury** — bowling, easy and reliable
- **Soft play (Dewsbury / Heckmondwike)** — always a safe option

Sports centre's usually your best bet if he just wants to run around and play.

You looking for something regular or just weekends?
